name: homebridge-denon-heos
description: Denon and possibly Marantz (some are tested with positive results) AVR support for Homebridge: [link](https://github.com/nfarina/homebridge) with support for newer version of receiver. This plugin uses the http commands to control the receivers. It is also possible to add a receiver as a tv to your homekit. This way, you can control the receiver with the remote. Set the volume with the remote and change the input, all in one block.

author.name: Nicolas Neubauer, Mart van Vliet, Thomas Verbeek
